accuracy_checks.label: Optimized Triton path vs repeated baseline

accuracy_contract.description: Only default-resolution (infer_length=1024) results are eligible for this report.

benchmark_dataset.name: Digital Corpora Bo767
benchmark_dataset.payload: JPEG bytes embedded in a data:image/jpeg;base64 JSONL prompt.
benchmark_dataset.rendering: PDFium render at 144 DPI, then JPEG quality 100 with 4:4:4 chroma sampling.
benchmark_dataset.selection: Page 1 from all 767 filename-sorted PDFs, followed by the first 233 available page-2 entries in the same order.
benchmark_dataset.verification: All 1,000 decoded JSONL JPEGs matched the ordered Bo767 render set in dimensions; mean PNG-to-JPEG PSNR was 62.50 dB.

deployment_optimization_curve.comparison_contract: Matched A100 native-vLLM runs over 1,000 JPEG Q100 4:4:4 document images repeated 10 times at infer_length=1024.

algorithm.alignment: each run's first sustained GPU-active sample becomes t=0
algorithm.comparison_contract: Matched A100 publication runs over the same 1,000-image JPEG Q100 4:4:4 corpus, repeated 30 times (30,000 timed images) at infer_length=1024.
algorithm.trailing_trace_policy: retain all samples through raw trace end

controls: Record zero failed requests and exactly 30,000 completed images.
Record 1,000 unique images, replay_count=30, and timed_workload_image_count=30,000.
Keep dataset encoding, model revision, GPU identity/power limit, and infer_length fixed.
Retain result JSON and raw GPU CSV paths plus SHA-256 hashes in report_data.json.
publication_methodology.hardware: One NVIDIA A100 80GB; run systems sequentially with no overlapping GPU workload.
publication_methodology.quality_contract: infer_length=1024 with the same model checkpoint and OCR post-processing contract.
publication_methodology.telemetry: Raw nvidia-smi timestamp, utilization.gpu, and power.draw samples at a target 250 ms interval, captured around the complete timed run.
publication_methodology.throughput_metric: Completed timed images divided by the artifact's measured timed span; exclude engine startup and warmup.
publication_methodology.workload: The same ordered 1,000-image JPEG Q100 4:4:4 corpus repeated 30 times, for 30,000 timed images per system.

runs.label: vLLM baseline
runs.note: This isolated run measures the PR's original vLLM OCR implementation with the clean official model source. The superseded 23.27 images/s run is discarded because a second full baseline occupied the same A100 for 98.6% of its timed window.

comparisons.label: Official HF run vs vLLM baseline
Official HF run vs optimized rec128 repeat
Official HF run vs optimized rec64

hf_output_agreement.interpretation_scope: Agreement with one stochastic official-HF output run; no ground-truth labels, and positional zipping is sensitive to region insertions/deletions.

methodology.native_scaling_note: The 8-replica point uses detector batch 16; the 1/2/4-replica points use detector batch 8.

nondeterminism_comparisons.interpretation_scope: Mismatch documentation only. Region sequence shifts make raw paired-region coordinate/confidence maxima unsuitable as quality evidence.

optimized_30k_variants.comparison_contract: Matched 30,000-image A100 runs using the same 1,000-image JPEG Q100 4:4:4 corpus repeated 30 times at infer_length=1024; only recognizer batching differs.

sequence_aware_audit.method: Levenshtein distance over each page's ordered region-text sequence; triple agreement is position-wise only on pages where A, B, and C have equal region counts.

title: Nemotron OCR v2 on A100: vLLM throughput
